tools.description: Retrieve immutable research capabilities for an exact canonical typed obligation. Results are candidates only; invocation still requires the current Tempera capability id and surface hash.
tools.name: query_research_retrieval

tools.description: List the built-in data-engine use cases for a project.
tools.name: projects.useCases.list

tools.description: Get a single use case by id.
tools.name: projects.useCases.get

tools.description: Ingest a raw artifact. Exact retries for the same project, source, and external_id return the existing artifact; different content for that identity returns ALREADY_EXISTS. AGENT_MEMORY_FEEDBACK uses the exact project-bound remi.memory_feedback.v1 contract; AGENT_TOOL_TRACE uses the exact data-engine.agent-tool-trace.v1 contract.

note.description: Optional disclosed note of at most 4,096 UTF-8 bytes; maxLength is the closest JSON Schema character bound.

nodeId.description: One to 256 UTF-8 bytes; maxLength is the closest JSON Schema character bound.

text.description: Optional disclosed memory text of at most 65,536 UTF-8 bytes; maxLength is the closest JSON Schema character bound.

environmentId.description: Null or one to 256 UTF-8 bytes; maxLength is the closest JSON Schema character bound.

projectId.description: One to 256 UTF-8 bytes; maxLength is the closest JSON Schema character bound.

tenantId.description: One to 256 UTF-8 bytes; maxLength is the closest JSON Schema character bound.

goalDigest.description: sha256 of the UTF-8 goal so identical goals group into preference pairs without disclosing the goal downstream.

tools.name: projects.artifacts.ingest

tools.description: Scrape a public URL. Unchanged retries ignore receiver fetch time; changed content requires a new producer_version or returns ALREADY_EXISTS.
tools.name: projects.web.ingest

tools.description: Run a complete use-case pipeline with at most 64 combined built-in, producer, and URL artifacts and 16 MiB of canonical artifact content. All predictable validation and URL fetches complete before durable artifact admission.

budgetCents.description: Planning metadata; not an enforced spend limit in this release.

requiredReviews.description: Independent primary review slots for each residual label.

verifier.description: Verifier backend; default nvidia. agent dispatches the configured coding agent (DATA_ENGINE_AGENT_CMD) per artifact; ensemble majority-votes across the tempera-llm gateway models (TEMPERA_LLM_GATEWAY_URL / DATA_ENGINE_ENSEMBLE_MODELS).

tools.name: projects.pipelines.runUseCase

tools.description: Create a labeling campaign; exact idempotency_key retries reuse one campaign.

budgetCents.description: Planning metadata; not an enforced spend limit in this release.

requiredReviews.description: Independent primary review slots for each residual label.

tools.name: projects.campaigns.create

tools.description: Atomically transition campaign admission state. Existing reviews and products remain usable.

targetStatus.description: PAUSED blocks new jobs, ACTIVE resumes admission, and CLOSED is terminal.

tools.name: projects.campaigns.transition

tools.description: List campaigns for a project.
tools.name: projects.campaigns.list

tools.description: List ingested artifacts for a project.
tools.name: projects.artifacts.list

tools.description: Get a verified artifact summary or explicitly request a full body when the immutable raw object is at most 8 MiB.
tools.name: projects.artifacts.get

tools.description: List verifier labels for an artifact.
tools.name: projects.artifacts.labels.list

tools.description: Create a verification job over artifacts. idempotency_key makes exact retries reuse one job; it is required for remi.memory_feedback.v1 and data-engine.agent-tool-trace.v1. The task families agent-memory-feedback and tool-trace are each reserved for selections containing only their typed contract. New campaign jobs require ACTIVE; completed exact retries remain readable after pause or close.

verifier.description: Verifier backend; default nvidia. agent dispatches the configured coding agent (DATA_ENGINE_AGENT_CMD) per artifact; ensemble majority-votes across the tempera-llm gateway models (TEMPERA_LLM_GATEWAY_URL / DATA_ENGINE_ENSEMBLE_MODELS).

tools.name: projects.jobs.create

tools.description: Get a job by id.
tools.name: projects.jobs.get

tools.description: Get the labels produced by a job.
tools.name: projects.jobs.results.list

tools.description: List the human residual review queue.
tools.name: projects.expertTasks.list

tools.description: Decide one expert residual idempotently. Requires review:resolve; the trusted gateway or central token supplies reviewer identity outside model arguments. A reviewer may deny downstream reuse without blocking the operational decision.

leaseToken.description: Opaque active assignment capability; required after a task has been claimed.

outcome.description: Adjudicate is accepted only for an adjudication task; abstain or flag creates one independent replacement with the same review role.

authorized.description: Caller assertion of reuse consent. False records the operational review but prevents product reuse; the receiver does not authenticate the underlying controller policy.

reuseTargets.description: Must be nonempty when authorized is true and empty when authorized is false.

tools.name: projects.expertTasks.resolve

tools.description: Get project usage and quality metrics.
tools.name: projects.metrics.get

tools.description: Get ecosystem readiness signals for a project.
tools.name: projects.ecosystem.readiness.get

tools.description: Emit or refresh a deterministic eval product from one job-scoped label snapshot.
tools.name: projects.products.emitEval

tools.description: Get an emitted product bundle by id.
tools.name: projects.products.get

tools.description: Get the bounded integrity-checked product manifest.
tools.name: projects.products.manifest.get

tools.description: Derive a post-training bundle (SFT records or preference pairs) from a READY product with a deterministic content-hash train/val split.

format.description: sft: one record per accepted item with the authoritative label as completion. preference: chosen/rejected pairs from expert overrides and disagreeing ensemble minority votes. rlvr: the executable reward - the task family's deterministic wasm verifier spec - with the authoritative label as reference metadata.

includeRaw.description: Inline each artifact's {artifactType, raw_body} (per record capped at 256 KiB; oversized inputs become {raw_omitted, raw_sha256}).

pageToken.description: Keyset token: the last processed artifact_name from the previous page.

pairSources.description: format=preference only: select the authority mix - expert_override is human feedback (RLHF-grade), ensemble_minority is AI feedback (RLAIF-grade). Defaults to both.

trainFraction.description: Deterministic content-addressed split threshold (default 0.9); identical raw content always lands in the same split.

tools.name: projects.products.derive

tools.description: Admit one exact READY eval-product generation for model training. Requires the dedicated training:publish scope, explicit training consent, and a separate zero-overlap heldout product.
tools.name: projects.trainingReleases.admit

tools.description: Revalidate a training release and return ACTIVE or durably STALE state.
tools.name: projects.trainingReleases.get

tools.description: Profile dataset quality: counts, duplicate raw_hash groups, label coverage, and confidence/decision/value distributions.

artifactIds.description: Full artifact resource names to profile; defaults to every artifact in the project.

tools.name: projects.datasets.profile

tools.description: Validate an emitted product bundle: referential integrity, in-bundle duplicates, needs_expert inclusions, and manifest health.
tools.name: projects.products.validate

tools.description: Check raw_hash overlap (leakage) between two product bundles for train/eval split hygiene.

productIds.description: Exactly two product ids to compare (e.g. a train and an eval bundle).

tools.name: projects.products.checkLeakage

tools.description: Get the label quality report: per-verifier stats, per-determinism counts, cross-verifier disagreements, and the needs_expert backlog.
tools.name: projects.labelQuality.get

tools.description: List source connectors (s3, snowflake, salesforce) with configured/unconfigured state and non-secret config. Secrets are never returned.
tools.name: projects.connectors.list

tools.description: Extract records/objects from a source connector (s3, snowflake, salesforce) and ingest them as content-addressed artifacts. Fails closed with FAILED_PRECONDITION when the connector's env config is absent.

artifactType.description: Artifact type for ingested records; defaults per connector.

ingest.description: Ingest extracted records as artifacts (default true).

key.description: s3: extract exactly this object key instead of listing.

maxObjects.description: s3: max objects to extract (default 25, cap 100).

metadata.description: Extra metadata merged into each ingested artifact.

prefix.description: s3: list objects under this key prefix.

soql.description: salesforce: SOQL SELECT query (required for salesforce).

source.description: Artifact source label; defaults to the connector name.

statement.description: snowflake: read-only SELECT/SHOW/DESCRIBE statement (required for snowflake).

tools.name: projects.sources.extract

tools.description: Create or version-bump a stored custom tool. Identical re-creates are idempotent; a changed definition creates a new retained version. Stored tools are advertised dynamically on the MCP catalog as custom.<project>.<name>.

implementation.description: deterministic_wasm: {wat: <WebAssembly text>}; llm_prompt: {template: <prompt with {{arg}} placeholders>}; regex: {pattern, operation: match|extract|replace|split, replacement?, flags?}; chain: {steps: [2-8 existing non-chain tool names]}.

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema for the tool's arguments; defaults to an open object.

tools.name: projects.tools.create

tools.description: List stored custom tools with usage stats (invocation_count, last_invoked_at, error_count) so stale tools can be pruned.
tools.name: projects.tools.list

tools.description: Get one stored custom tool: definition, version, and usage stats.
tools.name: projects.tools.get

tools.description: Invoke a stored custom tool. deterministic_wasm executes in the cradle sandbox (412 FAILED_PRECONDITION when DATA_ENGINE_CRADLE_URL is unset) and records program_sha256 + inputs_digest; llm_prompt renders the template with the arguments and runs the LLM client; regex runs the stored deterministic text op in-process; chain runs its stored step sequence with per-step provenance.

arguments.description: Tool arguments per its stored input_schema. deterministic_wasm tools take one integer 'n'; regex tools require a string 'text' field; chain steps receive the previous step's output.

tools.name: projects.tools.invoke

tools.description: Hard-delete a stored custom tool and its retained versions (audit-logged).
tools.name: projects.tools.delete
